Hero.Summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience designing scalable backend systems, AI-driven architectures, and cloud-native solutions. I specialize in Java/Spring Boot, Python, and distributed systems, with deep expertise in AI agent frameworks (CrewAI, LangGraph), LLM observability (Phoenix/Arize), and MCP-based automation. Passionate about building intelligent, observable, and production-ready AI systems.

Experience.Title: Professional Experience
Experience.Description: 4+ years building production systems across AI, backend, and cloud — from multi-agent LLM pipelines to enterprise ERPs.

Highlights: Owned end-to-end design and delivery of a multi-agent AI pipeline for real-time Wi-Fi network analytics, orchestrating specialized agents with CrewAI and LangGraph.
Architected an LLM proxy layer with dynamic routing between self-hosted models (Qwen, DeepSeek) and cloud providers (OpenAI, Anthropic), enabling seamless model swapping and A/B evaluation.
Integrated Phoenix (Arize) for end-to-end LLM observability — tracing agent sessions and tool calls to identify latency bottlenecks and hallucination patterns.
Designed Python streaming-telemetry and log-analyzer services consuming MQTT network data, with runtime-configurable APIs and scale testing up to 100 APs using InfluxDB and Mosquitto.
Led end-to-end implementation of backend features on Google Cloud (Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Firestore), owning architecture decisions and delivery.
Improved system reliability with a Redis-based batching system that regulated outbound requests, reducing rate-limit errors (HTTP 429) and stabilizing external API communication.
Automated the internal developer workflow by integrating MCP with JIRA, Confluence, and Bitbucket — including automatic PR generation — boosting team productivity.
Optimized MySQL data access patterns, resolving critical performance issues and significantly reducing response times.
Developed the backend of the FLIT transportation ERP with Java/Spring Boot, implementing JWT authentication and RESTful APIs.
Optimized response times with Data Transfer Objects (DTOs), achieving a 30% latency reduction.
Migrated from basic authentication to JWT with Spring Security, enabling Microsoft Azure SSO integration.
Built frontend components with React/Redux following Domain-Driven Design within Agile/Scrum workflows.
Developed a currency and cryptocurrency exchange platform in Odoo using MVC and OOP with real-time REST API integrations.
Implemented dynamic JavaScript visualizations for trend analysis and a PostgreSQL-backed regulatory reporting module.

Architected and delivered 5+ integrated systems for nightclub operations: personnel management, cross-platform mobile app, POS, attendance control with facial recognition, and an event marketing platform.
Implemented cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP with CI/CD, Docker, and Kubernetes — improving deployment speed by 60% and significantly reducing downtime.

Projects.Title: Featured Work
Projects.Description: A selection of professional and personal projects. Proprietary work is described without visuals to respect client confidentiality.

AiPipeline.Desc: Multi-agent AI pipeline for real-time Wi-Fi network analytics: specialized CrewAI/LangGraph agents for telemetry analysis and log classification, an LLM proxy across self-hosted and cloud models, and full observability with Phoenix/Arize.

McpAutomation.Desc: MCP-based automation of the internal developer workflow, integrating JIRA, Confluence, and Bitbucket with workflow orchestration and automatic PR generation — cutting manual work across the team.

Flit.Desc: ERP for the transportation sector that optimizes fleet management, trip planning, and ticketing. Java/Spring Boot backend with JWT authentication and a React/Redux frontend.

CryptoExchange.Desc: Currency and cryptocurrency exchange platform built in Odoo with real-time REST API integrations, dynamic trend visualizations, and a PostgreSQL-backed regulatory reporting module.

Nightclub.Desc: Suite of 5+ integrated systems for nightclub operations: personnel management, cross-platform mobile app, POS, facial-recognition attendance control, and an event marketing platform — deployed on AWS and GCP.

NeuroPeru.Desc: Medical platform for neurosurgery, neurology, and traumatology consultations. It also offers medical equipment rentals and an information hub managed by specialists.

BranchOut.Desc: Streamlines workforce tracking by scanning employee QR codes, instantly logging attendance with timestamps and key details. Filter and analyze records effortlessly.

Skills.Title: Skills & Technologies
Skills.Description: The stack I work with daily — from AI agent frameworks and LLM tooling to backend, frontend, cloud, and data infrastructure.

Contact.Title: Let's work together
Contact.Description: Looking for an engineer who can design, build, and ship production-ready AI and backend systems? Let's talk — I'm always open to new challenges.
